title: Subscription lifecycle / degradation state (v1alpha2)
description: Declarative snapshot of a subscription's lifecycle state and the resulting graceful degradation effects on an instance. TARGET-STATE contract. NON-NEGOTIABLE invariant encoded here: owner access and full export are preserved in EVERY state; additional users degrade to read-only; premium agents and scheduled tasks are PAUSED, not deleted; Personal capabilities always continue. No plan names, no prices, no data deletion.

grace_expires_at.description: When the offline grace window ends (only meaningful in past_due/grace).

owner_access.description: Owner ALWAYS retains access. Pinned by construction; a document that revokes owner access is invalid.

export_available.description: Full export ALWAYS available. Pinned true by construction (data is never held hostage).

additional_users.description: Additional (non-owner) users. Degrade to read_only when suspended/cancelled/expired; never deleted.

premium_agents.description: Premium/entitlement-gated agents. `paused` means disabled from execution but present and reactivable; never uninstalled.

scheduled_tasks.description: Scheduled tasks. `paused` means retained and reactivable; never cancelled/deleted.

new_invitations.description: Ability to invite new users. Blocked in suspended/cancelled/expired (see the state conditionals below and Spec G); allowed in active/past_due/grace.

updates.description: Update cadence available in this state.

notice.description: Non-blocking user-facing notice text (e.g. urgent renewal reminder). Never blocks Personal capabilities.
